hero.headline:
Your finances,
finally organized.
hero.subheadline: EXPOZOR helps you track expenses manually today, with receipt upload, CSV import, and AI-assisted categorization planned for early access. No bank login required.
hero.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! Check your inbox.
hero.waitlistError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

step2.label: Review the category
step2.message: Suggested as Food & Drink with 97% confidence.

features.title: Built for expense tracking without bank connections
features.subtitle: Manual entry today, with upload and import workflows planned for early access.

scan.title: Receipt capture planned
scan.description: Receipt upload and scanning are on the roadmap. Until they ship, the product copy treats them as planned features.

import.title: CSV import planned
import.description: CSV import is planned so you can bring in transaction files you choose to provide, without connecting a bank account.

ai.title: AI-assisted categorization planned
ai.description: AI suggestions are planned for early access. Manual review stays part of the workflow.

budgets.title: Budgets that flex
budgets.description: Track spending against simple limits and household categories as the product matures.

share.title: Shared expense notes
share.description: Track shared household expenses manually. EXPOZOR records notes only and does not initiate payments.

security.title: Built with security in mind
security.description: HTTPS in transit. No bank credentials collected. EXPOZOR tracks expenses only.

pricing.title: Simple pricing, not active yet
pricing.subtitle: EXPOZOR is waitlist-only today. Paid plans are not available yet.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: For deeper budgeting workflows once billing launches.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For advanced organization features planned for later.

households.name: Households
households.description: For families and couples who want manual shared tracking.

items.a: EXPOZOR uses HTTPS for data in transit. The current public site stores waitlist signup data only. We do not sell your data.

items.q: Do I need to connect my bank?
items.a: No. EXPOZOR does not require or collect bank credentials. You add expenses manually, and upload/import workflows are planned.

items.q: How does the AI categorization work?
items.a: AI-assisted categorization is planned for early access. It will be presented as a suggestion workflow, with user review before relying on results.

items.q: Can I share expenses with my household?
items.a: Shared expense tracking is planned as manual notes only. EXPOZOR does not initiate payments between users.

items.q: What happens if I want to cancel?
items.a: Billing is not active yet. While EXPOZOR is waitlist-only, there is no paid subscription to cancel.
